title: COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides small loans to people and businesses. Includes auto, consumer, credit-builder, micro, and small business loans. Also offers affordable housing finance and small business equity investments. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-0446 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (541) 345-0446 Lynn Meyer [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for application or screening FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Business Development Personal Loans Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE RENTALS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
